examples.name: valtown_example_script
examples.description: Email-triggered Val Town automation that summarizes inbound messages with Subconscious and Gmail MCP context
setup: # in Subconscious platform tools, enable gmail_mcp for this API key account
# create a new Email val in Val Town
# copy emailSummary.val.ts into your Email val
# set SUBCONSCIOUS_API_KEY=your_key in Val env vars
